meaning: n.捷克的货币单位,昔德国之小铜币
examples: But for Heller, writing was his life.
Gura represented security guard Dick Heller.
Heller enjoyed being a public figure, making speeches and going to parties.
To conserve the Trust's hard-raised money, Heller tries to get free gifts of land.
"It was as if a gallon of water was thrown to the ground, " Heller says.
